name: Pumpkin Oatmeal Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix topping ingredients until well blended. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 10-inch Bundt pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour and the baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and salt.
4. In a medium bowl, beat eggs with pumpkin, brown sugar, syrup, and oil until blended.
5. Stir in pumpkin mixture and oats into the flour mixture just until the flour is moistened. The batter should be lumpy.
6. Spoon batter into the prepared pan. Sprinkle topping evenly over the batter.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. If the topping starts to brown too quickly, cover loosely with foil during the last 10 minutes of baking.
8. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
